name: equativ-maestro-pp-mcp
description: Every Maestro deal, avails forecast, and report — scriptable, with a local database and offline analytics the web UI and official MCP server can't match.

equativ_client_id.title: EQUATIV_CLIENT_ID
equativ_client_id.description: Sets EQUATIV_CLIENT_ID for the Maestro by Equativ MCP server. Get a credential from https://help.equativ.com/get-started-with-user-administration/create-and-manage-api-users.

equativ_client_secret.title: EQUATIV_CLIENT_SECRET
equativ_client_secret.description: Sets EQUATIV_CLIENT_SECRET for the Maestro by Equativ MCP server. Get a credential from https://help.equativ.com/get-started-with-user-administration/create-and-manage-api-users.

equativ_maestro_oauth_scope.title: EQUATIV_MAESTRO_OAUTH_SCOPE
equativ_maestro_oauth_scope.description: Sets EQUATIV_MAESTRO_OAUTH_SCOPE for the Maestro by Equativ MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
